label: Trump's Impact on NOAA Algae Protection

comments.text: NEW: Trump Decimates NOAA Lab Protecting Great Lakes from Toxic Algae Blooms .bsky.social

Update: according to a now-former NOAA Great Lakes lab employee, it seems like the entire communications team was cut - the group that was responsible for relaying info to the public about things like harmful algal blooms, waves/currents, and lake-effect snow www.wzzm13.com/article/news...
www.propublica.org/article/noaa... Just one year ago, JD Vance (that lying prick) was a leading advocate of the Great Lakes…

The US government hates America. These incompetent ghouls fired the scientists who prevent algae blooms & eel infestations that decimate their own fisheries - and then demand 🇨🇦 cede the great lakes to them. 🤬
Trump Admin weakens Great Lakes protections against toxic algae. #GreatLakes #ToxicAlgae #EnvironmentalProtection

The Trump administration closed a key NOAA lab in Michigan that monitored toxic algae in the Great Lakes, endangering research essential for drinking water safety. This politically motivated move stopped studies on climate-related algal blooms worsened by pollution and rising temperatures.
Federal cuts reduce staff at NOAA Great Lakes lab, jeopardize efforts to monitor toxic algal blooms, ProPublica reports: planetdetroit.org/2025/05/grea...
Please. We couldn’t use our water due to an algae bloom in Lake Erie. Trump is taking away the NOAA monitors
I know, but it's another reason to contact elected representatives in Congress because if algae blooms and lampreys take over the Great Lakes, they are destroyed forever.

This is was people voted for? "Scientists and communicators tasked with tracking Great Lakes ice cover, keeping tabs on fish populations and protecting the region’s drinking water from toxic algae lost their jobs Thursday in the latest round of mass firings"
